languages.text: Вольный Торговец обнаружил чужеродное устройство ксеносов и должен решить: попытаться ли взорвать реплику изнутри или продолжать искать иной выход.

traits.locale_text: Вольный Торговец обнаружил чужеродное устройство ксеносов и должен решить: попытаться ли взорвать реплику изнутри или продолжать искать иной выход.

languages.text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape
languages.original_text: Вольный Торговец обнаружил чужеродное устройство ксеносов и должен решить: попытаться ли взорвать реплику изнутри или продолжать искать иной выход.

traits.locale_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device of alien origin and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape

languages.text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} steht nach der Entdeckung eines Xenotech-Gerätes vor einer Entscheidung: Soll {mf|er|sie} die Replik von innen heraus zerstören oder die Suche nach einem anderen Fluchtweg fortsetzen?
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape

traits.locale_text: {mf|Der Freihändler|Die Freihändlerin} steht nach der Entdeckung eines Xenotech-Gerätes vor einer Entscheidung: Soll {mf|er|sie} die Replik von innen heraus zerstören oder die Suche nach einem anderen Fluchtweg fortsetzen?

languages.text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a découvert un appareil de xénotechnologie et doit faire un choix : tenter de faire exploser la réplique de l'intérieur ou continuer à chercher un autre moyen de s'enfuir.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape

traits.locale_text: {mf|Le libre-marchand|La libre-marchande} a découvert un appareil de xénotechnologie et doit faire un choix : tenter de faire exploser la réplique de l'intérieur ou continuer à chercher un autre moyen de s'enfuir.

languages.text: 行商浪人发现了一件异形科技装置，现在必须做出抉择：是尝试从内部炸毁这座仿制品，还是继续寻找别的逃脱办法。
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape

traits.locale_text: 行商浪人发现了一件异形科技装置，现在必须做出抉择：是尝试从内部炸毁这座仿制品，还是继续寻找别的逃脱办法。

languages.text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha descubierto un dispositivo xenotecnológico, y ahora debe elegir entre tratar de detonar la réplica desde dentro o bien seguir buscando otra forma de escapar.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente ha descubierto un dispositivo xenotecnológico, y ahora debe elegir entre tratar de detonar la réplica desde dentro o bien seguir buscando otra forma de escapar.

languages.text: フリー・トレーダーはエイリアンのゼノス装置を発見し、内部からレプリカを爆破しようとするか、別の出口を探し続けるかを決めなければならない。
languages.original_text: The Free Trader has discovered the alien Xenos device and must decide whether to try to blow up the replica from the inside or continue to look for another way out.

languages.text: Hür Tacir bir zeno teknolojisi cihazı keşfetti ve şimdi bir seçim yapmalı: Kopyayı içeriden patlatmaya çalışmak ya da kaçmak için başka bir yol aramaya devam etmek.
languages.original_text: The Rogue Trader has discovered a xenotech device and must now choose: attempt to detonate the replica from within, or continue the search for another means of escape
